# Mycelium Tero Index ‚Äî the whole-corpus citation index (Layer 1)

> **Honesty:** `Empirical/Declared ‚Äî line/metadata heuristic over the corpus (generalizes tools/docgen/code_index.py and mycelium-doc/src/lib_index.rs to docs/issues/changelog/research/skills); source is ground truth. Use this index to find where to Read, not as an authoritative reference.`
> Use the index to find where to `Read`, not as an authoritative reference.

## Sibling indices (referenced, not duplicated)

These sibling indices own their own domains and are generated by their own tools ‚Äî this index links to them rather than re-indexing them (DRY).

| Index | Path | Covers | Regenerate |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api-index` | `docs/api-index/INDEX.md` | Rust kernel/tooling symbols (crates/\*): the mycelium-\* crate public/-adjacent API. | `tools/docgen/code_index.py (just docs-index)` |
| `lib-index` | `docs/lib-index/INDEX.md` | Self-hosted .myc symbols (lib/\*): per-nodule fn/type/ctor of the Mycelium stdlib+compiler. | `myc-doc lib-index (just lib-index-gen)` |
